name: explore-exit
description: P3.4 canonical exit-research loop: an exploration run (RecordExcursions on) → validate excursions>0 → exit-lab grid → owner-gate on the plateau pick → apply calibration → verification run → report. This finally puts real rows in TradeExcursions (closes F11's data famine).

steps.reason: review the exit-lab plateau and approve the calibration to apply
